description_long: This is a decorative ceramic drum with a cylindrical, slightly tapered body and a flat top. The surface is adorned with intricate, traditional Asian-style motifs, including floral patterns and narrative scenes featuring figures in boats and gardens, rendered in black, white, and red. The upper band is encircled by a floral and scrollwork border in red and gray, while the main body features alternating panels of narrative vignettes and floral designs. The drum's finish is smooth and glossy, suggesting a glazed ceramic material. There are no visible handles or hardware, and the top is solid, indicating it is not openable. The object appears well-crafted and in excellent condition, suitable for display or ceremonial use in an urban park or cultural setting.
description: A glazed ceramic drum with intricate Asian-style narrative and floral motifs in black, white, and red, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and a solid, flat top.
description_view_0: This view highlights a panel with figures in a boat under a willow tree, framed by floral and scrollwork borders.
description_view_1: This side shows two standing figures near an arched structure, with the red floral border prominently visible.
description_view_2: This angle displays a transition between narrative and floral panels, emphasizing the red and white floral motifs.
description_view_3: This view features a figure with an ox under a tree, with the red floral border and a dark background panel visible.
